name: calabash former
functional_purpose: form a calabash-like shape from the dough

construction_steps.reason: the base provides a foundation for the tool to rest on the dough
the body will help shape the dough into a calabash-like form

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a flat, broad, round plate
construction_steps.reason: the top will help shape the dough into a calabash-like form

placement_func:
def placement():
    self.tool = self.scene.add_entity(
        gs.Morph.Mesh(
            filename="assembled_tool.stl",
            pos=(0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
            euler=(0, 0, 0),
            scale=(1, 1, 1),
        )
    )
    self.tool.set_density(1000.0)
    self.tool.set_friction(1.5)
    self.tool.set_restitution(0.5)
